## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the project's conventions (Clean Architecture, DDD, CQRS).
- [ ] All comments and identifiers are in English.
- [ ] I have added tests where appropriate.
- [ ] `dotnet build` passes locally with zero warnings.
- [ ] `dotnet test` passes locally.
- [ ] Database changes (if any) include a migration.
- [ ] Documentation (README/CONTRIBUTING) updated where relevant.
